note: Always-on substrate every project type inherits. Lighthouse is a LAB PROXY, not the CWV pass condition: the SLO is field data at p75 (CrUX); fresh pages have no field data, so gate on Lighthouse-lab INP/TBT/LCP/CLS as the best pre-deploy oracle while recording the p75 thresholds as the SLO. INP replaced FID on 2024-03-12. WRAI refreshes by append-and-supersede on id, never delete.

standards.rule: A focused component must not be entirely hidden by author content such as sticky headers or footers.
Pointer targets are at least 24x24 CSS px, or have equivalent spacing or an alternative control.
Authentication must not rely on a cognitive-function test (recall, transcription) without an accessible alternative.
Information the user already entered in the same process is auto-populated or selectable, not re-entered (unless essential).
Text contrast is at least 4.5:1, or 3:1 for large text (>=24px, or >=18.66px bold).
UI components and meaningful graphics have at least 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors.
Color is never the sole means of conveying information, indicating action, or distinguishing an element.
Largest Contentful Paint <=2.5s at p75 (field). Prioritize the LCP element: no lazy-load, preload it, set explicit dimensions.
Interaction to Next Paint <=200ms at p75 (field). INP replaced FID 2024-03-12; gate the lab proxy on Lighthouse INP/TBT.
standards.source_title: Core Web Vitals: INP (replaced FID, Mar 2024)

standards.rule: Cumulative Layout Shift <=0.1 at p75 (field). Reserve space for media and dynamically injected content.
Emit DTCG-stable (2025.10): $value+$type required, .tokens.json, media type application/design-tokens+json, composite types and $extensions preserved on round-trip.
standards.source_title: DTCG Format Module first stable 2025.10 (pin to stable, NOT the live drafts URL)
